name: Grid
description: Chart grid background with dashed guide lines and axis labels for line charts, bar charts, and diagrams. Supports vertical (default) and horizontal orientations with toggleable x/y axis labels.

props.name: labels
props.description: Labels for the primary axis (y-axis in vertical, x-axis in horizontal).

props.name: secondaryLabels
props.description: Labels for the secondary axis (x-axis in vertical, y-axis in horizontal).

props.name: showPrimaryAxis
props.description: Show the primary axis labels (y-axis in vertical, x-axis in horizontal).

props.name: showSecondaryAxis
props.description: Show the secondary axis labels (x-axis in vertical, y-axis in horizontal).

props.name: horizontal
props.description: Horizontal bar chart layout — grid lines run vertically.

states.rationale: Passive chart background. No interactive states — visibility and content are controlled by parent chart code.

propertyMapping.notes: In vertical mode maps to showPrimaryAxis; in horizontal mode maps to showSecondaryAxis.
In vertical mode maps to showSecondaryAxis; in horizontal mode maps to showPrimaryAxis.

useWhen: Providing the background grid for a line chart or area chart
Rendering axis labels and dashed guide lines for a bar chart
Creating a reference grid for any data visualization or diagram
doNotUseFor: CSS grid layouts — use layout tokens and flexbox/grid directly
